zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Barrett於1368年出生在英國維爾爾其朋納姆時，她的父親Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham31歲，母親Jane Empson48歲。她於1384年與Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年在英國坎布利其爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix Barrett于1368年出生在英国維爾爾其朋納姆时，她的父亲Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham31岁，母亲Jane Empson48岁。她于1384年与Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1425年在英国坎布利其爾享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Barrett was born in 1368, in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham, was 31 and her mother, Jane Empson, was 48. She married Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London in 1384, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1425, in Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix Barrett est née en 1368, à Chippenham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jane Empson, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London en 1384, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1425, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix Barrett 1368 in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham 31 und ihre Mutter Jane Empson 48. Sie hat 1384 in Wiltshire, England Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1425 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Barrett è nata il nel 1368 nel Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Jane Empson, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London nel 1384, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Barrettが1368年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチップエンハムで生まれた時，父Sir William Barrett Of Chipperhamは31歳，母Jane Empsonは48歳であった。1384年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでSir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of Londonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム フエレルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Barrett(이)가 1368년 영국 윌츠히르 치펜함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Empson(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1384년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 히아 페레르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Barrett nasceu em 1368, em Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Jane Empson, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London em 1384, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1425, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Barrett родилась в 1368 г. в местности чиппенам, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Empson, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London в 1384 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1425 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности хаиам фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
